title: Expose unified location metadata in gateway /status CBOR
description: Gateway /status currently exposes only legacy location_provider/time_provider and coordinate fields from HAL. After project-LICHEN-zte2 adds source class/name/fix state/age/accuracy metadata, extend /status CBOR and tests to expose source class, source name, fix state, age, and accuracy/freshness fields. Acceptance: native_sim/qemu test decodes /status CBOR for absent, fresh, stale, and named-source samples; stale samples do not export position as fresh.
notes: Implemented gateway /status CBOR location metadata no-hardware slice. Code changes: factored status encoding into lichen/apps/gateway/src/status_cbor.{c,h}; gateway main now obtains HAL power + location/time snapshots and encodes metadata fields loc_source_class, loc_source, loc_fix_state, loc_age_s, hacc_mm, vacc_mm while preserving rank/role/rpl/uptime/provider and legacy lat_i/lon_i/alt_m/time_unix/satellites fields. Gateway CoAP server message size set to 768 and guarded with BUILD_ASSERT against 512-byte status CBOR body plus option overhead. Added lichen/tests/gateway_status coverage for absent providers, fresh named-source metadata, fully populated max-size status body, and HAL-derived stale sample suppression of position/accuracy/time/satellites. Initial reviews: Rawls found P1 scratch-buffer overflow and P1 CoAP response-buffer risk; Boyle found P1 scratch-buffer overflow and P2 stale test did not exercise HAL-derived stale suppression. Fixed by raising status CBOR max to 512, adding full-size body test, setting CONFIG_COAP_SERVER_MESSAGE_SIZE=768 plus BUILD_ASSERT, and routing stale test through lichen_hal_location_submit()/lichen_hal_location_time_snapshot_get(). Re-reviews: Carver no P0/P1/P2; Copernicus no P0/P1/P2 and independently passed qemu gateway_status build/run plus qemu gateway app build. Local check: git diff --check PASS. EC2 validation on i-05e27e074db786e22 clean worktree /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-location-v1: west twister -T lichen/tests/gateway_status -p native_sim -p qemu_x86 --inline-logs --integration --outdir twister-out-gateway-status-v5 -x=ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=$PWD/lichen PASS, 2/2 configs, 8 cases, 0 skipped, 0 warnings, 42.40s. Gateway app: west build -p always -b qemu_x86 lichen/apps/gateway -d build-gateway-qemu-status-v5 -- -DZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=$PWD/lichen PASS; memory RAM 241948 B / 31 MB (0.74%). Broad regression: west twister -T lichen/tests/gateway_status -T lichen/tests/gateway_config -T lichen/tests/app_interface -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_gateway_adapter -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_codec -p native_sim -p qemu_x86 --inline-logs --integration --outdir twister-out-gateway-status-consumers-v2 -x=ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=$PWD/lichen PASS, 6/8 configs passed, 2 static skips, 86 cases executed, 38 skipped, 0 warnings, 128.56s.
close_reason: Completed gateway /status CBOR location metadata no-hardware scope with native_sim/qemu Twister, qemu gateway app build, two clean final code reviews, and evidence recorded in notes.
